title: 'Weak on crime': Donald Trump slams Pope Leo over 'enough of war' remark on Iran
summary_full: President Trump sharply criticized Pope Leo XIV, labeling him "weak on crime" and "terrible for foreign policy." Trump accused the pontiff of being soft on Iran's nuclear ambitions and opposing US military actions, while the Pope had called for peace and dialogue amid global conflicts.
